injuries.notes: Team leading tackler, defensive signal caller. Left AFC Championship early. Limited practice. If playing at 70% effectiveness, significant defensive downgrade.
Team sack leader. Snap counts declining drastically: 26 → 11 → 0 through playoffs. Even if active, likely on severe pitch count.
Throwing shoulder. Cleared and full participant, but risk against elite pass rush.

off_field.notes: Felony strangulation charge. Called it 'a very emotional time.' Arraignment delayed to 5 days post-Super Bowl.
Franchise GOAT said 'no dog in the fight.' Spillane: 'makes me sick.' Could be motivator OR distraction. Net neutral with wide variance.
Owner's name in documents. Background noise.
Rapper Drake placed $1M bet on Patriots. Historical track record of Drake-backed teams/athletes losing. Meme-tier but include for fun.

injuries.notes: DROY candidate. Ankle scare in practice but fully cleared.

patriots.notes: Won three straight but margins declining: 13, 12, 3. AFC Championship 10-7 in snow — survival mode.

seahawks.notes: Beat 49ers 41-6 (dominant), then Rams 31-27. Offense is explosive and rolling.

patriots.notes: AP Coach of the Year. Former Patriot (3 SB rings as player). First year HC, historic turnaround. Motivational edge and Super Bowl experience.

seahawks.notes: Young, innovative defensive mind. Scheme complexity could be X-factor. Strong playoff defensive adjustments.

sb_xlix_rematch.notes: Patriots beat Seahawks in Super Bowl XLIX (2015). Revenge narrative but different rosters entirely.

patriots_sb_history.notes: 11 appearances, 6 wins — most in NFL history. Franchise pedigree.

neutral_site.notes: Santa Clara, CA. West Coast slightly favors Seattle travel, but neutral site game. Minimal impact.

weather.notes: Open-air stadium, clear and moderate temps. Favors passing games slightly. Light wind, no meaningful impact on kicking or deep passing.
